item.title: Golfpunter1: Luke Paton @Golfpunter1 · 5min I often talk about one of the best things about being involved with this industry is watc
item.description: Luke Paton @Golfpunter1 · 5min I often talk about one of the best things about being involved with this industry is watching high quality sport. The very best competing. The down side is having to sit and watch this Arsenal team. Complete and utter dross. Week in week out. The Unwatchables. 1 10 214

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 11min . @wingoz interviewed Brian Rolapp this afternoon and asked him about the ongoi
item.description:
Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 11min . @wingoz interviewed Brian Rolapp this afternoon and asked him about the ongoing situation with LIV Golf.
Rolapp: “We’re pretty focused on what we’re doing here.” De trey wingo 2 1 10 1 mil

item.title:

item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 15min Greatest European golfer?
As a comparison, here's where the Rory, Faldo and Seve were in their careers aged 36 (same age Rory is today). 5 2 26 1 mil
